xwikidoc.name: WebHome
xwikidoc.creator: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.author: xwiki:XWiki.Admin
xwikidoc.title: Project Documentation Homepage
xwikidoc.content:
= 🚀 Project Documentation Homepage =
{{info}} Welcome to the documentation space for this OpenProject-linked project.
Use this page as the central hub for project status, key links, delivery progress, and live ticket insights. {{/info}}
== 🎯 Project Summary ==
This project aims to deliver a clear, well-documented solution with transparent planning, structured specifications, and traceable execution.
* 🔗 **Linked OpenProject project:** //Linked project placeholder// * 🎯 **Parent work package:** //Linked parent work package placeholder// * 👤 **Project owner:** //Name placeholder// * 📅 **Current phase:** //Discovery / Implementation / Testing / Launch//
== ✅ Open Tickets ==
{{openproject filters="{~"query~":{~"filters~":[{~"property~":~"status~",~"constraints~":[{~"operator~":~"o~",~"value~":~"~"}]}]~}~}" limit="15"/}}
== 👤 Assigned to Me ==
{{openproject filters="{~"query~":{~"filters~":[{~"property~":~"assignees~",~"constraints~":[{~"operator~":~"=~",~"value~":~"me~"}]}]~}~}" limit="9" workItemsDisplayer="liveDataCards"/}}
== 📊 Project Health Charts ==
{{container layoutStyle="columns"}} ((( {{openprojectchart datasetsLabels="[~"Open Work Packages~",~"Closed Work Packages~"]" filters="[{~"query~":{~"filters~":[{~"property~":~"status~",~"constraints~":[{~"operator~":~"o~",~"value~":~"~"}]}]~}~},{~"query~":{~"filters~":[{~"property~":~"status~",~"constraints~":[{~"operator~":~"c~",~"value~":~"~"}]}]~}~}]" limit="300" property="creationDate" type="line" typeParams="{~"period~":~"DAILY~",~"metric~":~"accumulate~"}"/}} )))
((( {{openprojectchart limit="400" property="type" type="pie" typeParams="{~"period~":~"~",~"metric~":~"count~"}"/}} ))) {{/container}}
== 🔗 Useful Links ==
|= Resource |= Description | | OpenProject project | //Link to the connected OpenProject project// | Parent epic | //Link to the selected parent work package // | Specifications | [[Project Specifications>>Project Specifications]] | Meeting notes | [[Meeting Notes>>doc:.Project Meeting Notes yyyy MM dd.WebHome]]
== 📈 Key Milestones ==
* 🚩 //Milestone 1 — dummy description of a key delivery date// * 🚩 //Milestone 2 — dummy description of a key delivery date// * 🏁 //Final delivery — dummy description of target completion//
//For the full calendar of dates synced from OpenProject, see the [[Project Specifications>>Project Specifications]] page.//
== 👥 Team & Contacts ==
|=Role|=Name|=Contact |Project Lead|//John Doe//|//john.doe@example.com// |Product Owner|//John Doe//|//john.doe@example.com// |Tech Lead|//John Doe//|//john.doe@example.com//
== 🧭 Next Steps ==
* Review open tickets. * Update project specifications. * Add recent meeting notes. * Check charts for progress and risks.
💡 //Tip: Use the "Project Specifications" page for detailed requirements, and "Project Meeting Notes yyyy MM dd" to track decisions and action items.//
